# Earnings Calendar, Analyst Estimates And Stocks To Watch

FacebookXLinkedInShare

Licensing

 IBD STAFF
 Updated 04:37 PM ET 05/01/2026

OK Cancel

## Earnings Calendar

## Weekly Earnings Preview

A continued rise in earnings estimates for the Energy sector has further elevated its growth outlook, as expectations remain well above early 2026 forecasts. The upward Energy revisions are aiding the broader aggregate revisions trend, with S&P 500 earnings for 2026 Q1 now expected to be up 13.4% on 9.0% higher revenues. Energy stocks have benefited from the sector’s strengthening earnings outlook, with the Zacks Energy sector outperforming the S&P 500, the Russell 2000, and even the Zacks Tech sector YTD. Soaring oil prices can have significant impacts on households and businesses, though futures prices suggest that market participants don’t expect supply disruptions to be long-lasting.

### This Week's Calendar Events [...] ### Today's Announcecements

## Weekly Earnings Preview

A continued rise in earnings estimates for the Energy sector has further elevated its growth outlook, as expectations remain well above early 2026 forecasts. The upward Energy revisions are aiding the broader aggregate revisions trend, with S&P 500 earnings for 2026 Q1 now expected to be up 13.4% on 9.0% higher revenues. Energy stocks have benefited from the sector’s strengthening earnings outlook, with the Zacks Energy sector outperforming the S&P 500, the Russell 2000, and even the Zacks Tech sector YTD. Soaring oil prices can have significant impacts on households and businesses, though futures prices suggest that market participants don’t expect supply disruptions to be long-lasting.
